title: Ingersoll Rand Announces Addition of Jennifer Hartsock to its Board of Directors
text: DAVIDSON, N.C.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR), a global provider of mission-critical flow creation and industrial solutions, announced that Jennifer Hartsock has been appointed to its Board of Directors, effective January 1, 2023.

title: Ingersoll Rand Is A Good Buy At The Current Levels
text: Ingersoll Rand is seeing good demand, especially for its products like compressors, oil-free products, and oil-lubricated products. The increased orders, augmented by the Ingersoll Rand Execution Excellence (IRX) process resulted in backlog growth of 40% Y/Y last quarter.

title: Ingersoll Rand Inc. (IR) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Ingersoll Rand Inc. (NYSE:IR ) Q3 2022 Results Conference Call November 3, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Matthew Fort - Vice President, Investor Relations Vicente Reynal - Chairman & Chief Executive Officer Vik Kini - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Mike Halloran - Baird Julian Mitchell - Barclays Joe Ritchie - Goldman Sachs Andy Kaplowitz - Citigroup Rob Wertheimer - Melius Research Brandon McCann - Morgan Stanley Nathan Jones - Stifel Operator Hello, everyone, and welcome to Ingersoll Rand Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call. My name is Emily, and I will be coordinating your call today.

title: Ingersoll Rand (IR) Q3 Earnings & Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Ingersoll Rand's (IR) Q3 earnings reflect gains from solid segmental results.
